about.title: About
about.subtitle: Minecraft plugin developer
about.heading: I make servers work the way they should
about.p1: I'm Kyo. Been doing this for 3+ years — developing custom plugins, configuring servers, making everything behave, fixing lag, and building networks that actually hold up. I write plugins from scratch and make them work together like a well-oiled machine.
about.p2: I've set up Velocity proxy networks, survival servers from scratch, minigame arenas, auth systems, economies, you name it. Every project is different, and I like it that way.
about.p3: Outside of paid work I publish templates, write guides, and share scripts on GitHub. I think the Minecraft server community grows stronger when we help each other out.
about.valuesSubtitle: The principles that guide my work
about.value1Desc: Every plugin, every config file, every permission node — I check it twice so nothing breaks.
about.value2Desc: Lag is the enemy. I tune tick rates, optimize database calls, and trim every millisecond I can.
about.value3Desc: Clear communication, honest timelines, no surprises. You always know where things stand.
about.value4Desc: Players should not have to think about what runs under the hood. They just play.
about.value5Desc: From a 10-player towny server to a 10,000-player network — the architecture should just work.
about.value6Desc: I open-source templates, write guides, and share what I learn. The community is better when we all share.

timeline.title: Plugin Configuration
timeline.description: Started configuring plugins for small servers. Learned LuckPerms, DeluxeMenus, PlaceholderAPI, and server optimization.

timeline.title: Server Networks
timeline.description: Moved to multi-server networks. Set up Velocity proxies, Redis synchronization, and managed 10+ servers.

timeline.title: Custom Development
timeline.description: Started writing my own plugins from scratch. Moved from configuring existing plugins to building exactly what servers need.

timeline.title: My Own Plugins
timeline.description: Developing my own plugin suite and releasing as many resources as possible on GitHub. Sharing everything I build so others can use and learn from it.
